title: Usopp Boasts Before the Straw Hats
description: On pages 13–15, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You don't have to explain! I will ask you about it later

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Or is there something you need to say?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've heard some rumors about you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The VIL- lagers talk about you all the time

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: You may call me Captain usopp

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You were lurking outside the gates

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I heard that there's a huge mole inside the mansion!! So I wanted to see it for myself

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hahaha... I see that you can certainly lie well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have heard about your father too...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You're the son of a filthy pirate

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm not surprised that you turned out this way

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: But you had better stay away from my ojousama!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: You and the Ojousama belong to totally diff- Feren't worlds

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is it money that you're looking for? Name your price

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
